text: A small bathroom finished in white tiling, towels and shower curtains.
People crossing a city street with a green light ahead.
A black sign is hanging on a street pole
A train is running through the train station.
A long train on a track next to another track.
a little plane flying across a bright blue sky
a small girl in a blue dress is holding a tennis racket
Silhouette of adult as lit by setting sun over water way.
A post with a lettered street sign attached.
A dog rests on the ground holding a flying disc between its legs.
